SSC.Title: Student Card
SSC.NoPermission: You do not have permission to view this card.
SSC.Name: Name
SSC.ActivityLimitWarning: A student can normally benefit from two extracurriculars, or one extracurricular while holding a job.
SSC.TutoringWarning: Failed exam: mark tutoring/suspension manually if this applies.
SSC.GmSelectActor: Choose a player character to open their card.
SSC.EndAcademicYearConfirm: End the academic year? Exam Student Dice will be removed, but relationships and report card results will remain.
SSC.SettingShowLauncherHint: Shows a visible Student Card button on the right side of the screen.
SSC.SettingResetOnLongRest: Reset Student Dice after long rest
SSC.SettingResetOnLongRestHint: When D&D 5e reports a long rest, spent Student Dice are marked available again.
SSC.ImportFailed: Student card import failed. Check that the file is valid JSON.
SSC.ImportPreview: Import this file into {actor}? The current card data will be replaced.
SSC.NoVisibleYears: No report card years are visible to players yet.
SSC.StudentDiePrompt: {actor} rolled {skill}. Use a Student Die from {source} and roll 1d4?
SSC.InspirationPrompt: {actor} rolled {roll}. Choose one available Inspiration to spend and roll a reroll d20?
SSC.SettingPromptStudentDie: Prompt for Student Dice on skill and tool checks
SSC.SettingPromptStudentDieHint: When a character makes a matching skill or tool check, ask that player whether to roll and spend an available Student Die.
SSC.NoUsedDice: No used Student Dice to reset.
SSC.GraduationSharedOn: Graduation is now visible to players.
SSC.GraduationSharedOff: Graduation is now hidden from players.
SSC.StudentDiePromptMulti: {actor} rolled {skill}. Choose which of the {count} matching Student Dice to spend.
